titleZh: Lely牧场整体解决方案：以牛为本的智慧养殖与自动化管理
summaryZh: 本文介绍了Lely公司针对奶牛养殖的系列解决方案，涵盖牛舍设计、自动挤奶、精准饲喂、牛体刷、蹄浴及智能识别标签等。方案强调通过自动化设备和物联网技术提升奶牛健康与福利，同时降低人工成本、提高生产效率。内容聚焦于奶牛养殖场景，技术成熟度较高，创新性中等，但实践指导性强，适合规模化牧场参考。
translationZh:
**解决方案概览**

**牛舍**

探索

**饲养与护理**

**优化牛舍设计，保障奶牛健康**

对每头奶牛进行个体化护理可提升整个牛群的综合表现。以奶牛为核心的优化牛舍设计能够营造动物友好的环境，促进奶牛健康与福祉。这样的环境可预防健康问题，同时让工作环境更舒适，并最大限度减少工作量。高效的工作方式使您能够在愉快且动物友好的环境中全身心投入奶牛护理。这不仅能改善奶牛健康、提高产量，还能降低成本，最终实现动物与饲养员双赢的优质牛舍。

**实现高效放牧**

**放牧通道**

借助正确的策略，放牧可以与自动挤奶完美结合。放牧通道选择箱是实现这一目标的关键工具。奶牛可自行决定是否以及何时外出放牧。放牧通道通过Tags牛只识别系统判断是否允许其外出。

**按需精准饲喂精料**

**Cosmix**

Cosmix与Astronaut挤奶机器人及Lely Tags牛只识别系统配合使用，可根据每头奶牛的需求精准投喂精料，从而改善瘤胃健康并提高产奶量。该系统确保高效饲喂，减少浪费，防止霉变或结块。Horizon管理系统可提供每头奶牛精料采食量和挤奶数据的详细洞察。

**专为自动挤奶开发**

**Lely Astronaut冷却罐**

全天候保障牛奶质量和最高卫生标准——这就是Lely Astronaut冷却罐所能提供的。冷却从第一滴牛奶开始，并根据罐内牛奶量进行调整。该冷却罐与我们的自动挤奶系统Lely Astronaut无缝协作。

**实现最佳奶牛舒适度**

**Luna**

Luna牛体刷旨在呵护和照顾您的奶牛。Luna刷拭皮肤，促进血液循环。这不仅让奶牛更加放松，还能使整个牛群更安静。刷拭不仅能改善血液循环，还能清除皮肤上的灰尘和其他污垢，减少皮肤瘙痒。刷拭对奶牛来说是一种放松，它们每天会愉快地接受多次刷拭。

了解更多关于Luna的信息

**高效蹄部护理**

**Lely Meteor蹄浴**

Lely Meteor蹄浴提供定期的蹄部护理。使用安全：只需按一下按钮，蹄浴盆便会注满水和蹄部护理产品。奶牛走过蹄浴盆，从而获得所需的高效蹄部护理。可在挤奶机器人挤奶后或牛舍内其他指定位置轻松进行。

在蹄浴中使用专门开发的Lely Meteor蹄浴液进行预防性护理，可实现对蹄部的最佳护理。该产品不含福尔马林、硫酸铜、季铵化合物和抗生素。系统具有自清洁功能，确保任何污染都不会影响牛群的蹄部健康。

**全天候洞察您的奶牛**

**Lely Tags**

真正洞察奶牛健康状况可预防疾病和产量损失。Lely Tags牛只识别系统每两小时测量每头奶牛最重要的生命体征数据。有多种标签可供选择，用于识别、发情检测和反刍监测等不同方面。

**为什么选择我们的解决方案？**

我们的解决方案不仅贡献于高品质牛奶。它们提供选择自由和灵活性，并有助于您和奶牛的健康。从机器到软件和新创新，我们拥有众多选择。请联系我们的Lely中心获取建议。

featuredReason: 该方案系统展示了奶牛养殖中自动化设备与物联网技术的实际应用，涵盖挤奶、饲喂、健康监测等关键环节，对规模化牧场升级具有直接参考价值。
contentFull:
Solutions overview

Solutions

Barn

Explore

Housing and caring

Optimal barn design for optimal cow health

Proper individual care of cows enhances the overall performance of the herd. An optimal barn design that focuses on the cows creates an animal-friendly environment, promoting cow health and well-being. Such an environment prevents health issues and is pleasant to work in, all while minimizing your workload. Efficient work practices allow you to devote full attention to cow care in a pleasant and animal-friendly setting. This improves cow health, leads to better yields, and reduces costs, resulting in an optimal barn for the well-being of both the animals and the caretaker.

For efficient grazing 

Grazeway

With the right strategy, grazing can be perfectly combined with automatic milking. The Grazeway selection box is an essential tool for this. Cows choose for themselves whether and when they want to go out to pasture. The Grazeway then determines whether or not they can, using the Tags cow-recognition system.

Concentrates according to requirements

Cosmix

The Cosmix, in conjunction with the Astronaut and the Lely Tags cow-recognition, enhances rumen health and milk yield by providing precise concentrate feeding according to each cow’s requirements. This system ensures efficient feeding, reducing wastage and preventing mould or lumps. Horizon management system offers detailed insights into individual cow concentrate intake and milking data.

Developed for automatic milking

Cooling tank for Lely Astronaut

Round-the-clock safeguarding of milk quality and maximum hygiene: that is what the Cooling tank for Lely Astronaut has to offer. Cooling starts with the first drop of milk and is adjusted based on the milk volume in the tank. The tank seamlessly works in tandem with the Lely Astronaut, our automatic milking system.

For optimal cow comfort

Luna

The Luna cow brush is designed to pamper and care for your cows. The Luna brushes the skin and stimulates blood circulation. This leads not only to a more relaxed cow but also a calmer herd. Brushing not only improves blood circulation but also cleans dust and other dirt from the skin. This reduces itchy skin. Brushing is relaxing for the cows and they will happily be brushed several times a day.

Read more about Luna

Efficient hoof care

Hoof bath for Lely Meteor

The Hoof bath for Lely Meteor offers regular care for hooves. Safe to use: with a simple push of a button, the foot bath fills up with water and a hoof care product. The cows walk through the hoof bath, thereby obtaining the efficient hoof care they need. Easy to do after milking in the milking robot or in another set spot in the barn.

The preventive action with the special developed Lely Meteor Hoof Bath Liquid for application in the hoof bath is for optimal care of the hooves. This product is free from formalin, copper sulfates, QACs and antibiotics. The system is self-cleaning, ensuring that any contamination does not affect the hoof health of the herd.

24/7 insights about your cows

Lely tags

A true insight into your cows’ health prevents diseases and loss of production. Lely tags cow-recognition measures the most vital data per cow every two hours. There are tags for various aspects, such as identification, checking whether the cow is in heat and rumination.

Why our solutions?

Our solutions contribute to more than just high-quality milk. They offer freedom of choice and flexibility and contribute to the well-being of you and your cows. From machines to software and new innovations, we have many options. Contact one of our Lely Centers for advice.

Get free advice
